texto: Last, I would like to thank the dogs, not just the Vick pack, but all of them, simply for being dogs, which is to say, tolerant and perseverant; willing to connect with a world that does not always return their affection; and for proving, time and again, that life, while messy, difficult, and imperfect, has the capacity to exceed our expectations and feed our undying hope.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jim Gorant: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Last, I would like to thank the dogs, not just the Vick pack, but all of them, simply for being d…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, dogs, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
